thinking.text:
I need to analyze the task. I have a video file at /app/video.mp4 showing someone playing Zork. I need to transcribe all the text from the video and extract the moves they input, then create /app/solution.txt with those moves one per line.

First, let me check what tools are available in the environment to process video files. I should check what's installed.

tool_calls.Name: execute_shell
tool_calls.Arguments: {"keystrokes": "which ffmpeg ffprobe python3 python tesseract ocr 2>/dev/null; echo \"---\"; apt list --installed 2>/dev/null | grep -i -E \"ffmpeg|tesseract|ocr|python|pytesseract|moviepy|opencv\" | head -20\\n", "duration": 0.3}
